extraction.one_line_summary: CARUSO attacked with BARDET and team support on Splügen descent, held 24s over BERNAL's MARTÍNEZ-driven chase on Alpe Motta.
tactical_patterns: MARTÍNEZ paced so hard on final climb ALMEIDA cracked despite starting with BERNAL, exposing podium weakness.
Team DSM caught break on Bernardino descent then facilitated CARUSO/BARDET bridge, orchestrating entire move without GC threat.
CARUSO attacked without waiting for final climb, using descent/valley to build gap before gradient nullified time gains.
BILBAO brought CARUSO across on Splügen while INEOS still had numbers, revealing BERNAL team's poor positioning awareness.

rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: offensive ride unprecedented for career domestique, strongest legs all race enabled solo finish climb
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: paced final climb so hard only BERNAL survived, demonstrated lieutenant capable of destroying GC riders
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: dropped by MARTÍNEZ pace despite sitting BERNAL's wheel, fourth three consecutive mountain stages signals podium vulnerability
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: struggled with MARTÍNEZ tempo suggesting 2021 form insufficient for top-tier GC finishing
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: sat CARUSO wheel entire finale prioritizing stage over time, tactical discipline without punch
rider_signals.BOUCHARD Geoffrey: neutral: swept remaining KOM points after break caught, jersey tactics rather than stage ambition
